GotrylSign in
AI-powered cloud testing

Test your app in plain English.
No Playwright required.

Describe what to test. Gotryl generates the Playwright code, runs it in the cloud, and returns screenshots, videos, and AI-diagnosed failure reports.

Get startedSee how it works
$ gotryl project create "My App"
Created project prj_a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8
$ gotryl test create --project prj_a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8 \
--description "user can sign up with email"
Created test tst_x9y8z7w6v5u4t3s2
$ gotryl test run tst_x9y8z7w6v5u4t3s2 \
--target-url https://myapp.com --wait
✓ Run passed (4231ms)

How it works

01

Describe

Write what you want to test in plain English. No code needed.

02

Generate

Claude AI writes a Python Playwright test file tailored to your description and target URL.

03

Run

Tests execute in isolated cloud containers. No Playwright installation on your machine.

04

Diagnose

Failures come with screenshots, video recordings, and AI root-cause hypotheses.

Built for developers and AI agents

👩‍💻

Developers

Get test coverage without writing or maintaining Playwright code. Point Gotryl at any URL and describe what should work.

🤖

Coding agents

Claude Code and Cursor can call Gotryl via MCP to test features as they build them — write, test, fix, repeat.

🔁

CI/CD pipelines

Drop the GitHub Actions workflow into your repo. Gotryl runs on every pull request and posts results as PR comments.

Install the CLI

Works with Claude Code, Cursor, and any terminal.

$ npm install -g @gotryl/cli
Sign in to get your API key
© 2026 Gotryl. Built for developers who ship fast.
